items.name_en: New Arrival CE Triomphe Kelly Bag
items.name_cn:
New Arrival CE Triomphe Kelly Bag
New Kelly Triomphe bag, full of sophistication!
Simple and exquisite silhouette presents a capable style and pure aesthetics. Whether it is the steady black, understated brown, or soft pink, it radiates unparalleled sophistication.
The Kelly classic shape has simple and generous lines, no need for extra decoration, and instantly shows aesthetic charm.
Style No.: 117523
Size: 25.5x18.5x10

items.name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The Gucci Go series is designed for sport. This shoulder bag is made of glossy leather, featuring a delicate chain strap that exudes a modern temperament. The interior layout is practical, with a removable mirror on the back.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The Gucci Go series is designed for sport. This shoulder bag is made of glossy leather, featuring a delicate chain strap that exudes a modern temperament. The interior layout is practical, with a removable mirror on the back.
Gucci Black (Rosso Ancora) Glossy Leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Black cotton-linen lining
Interior: three main compartments, one zip pocket
Exterior: removable mirror on the back
Chain strap (21cm high); detachable adjustable shoulder strap (27cm high); length adjustable between 64cm and 103cm
Spring buckle
Model: 826761.
Dimensions: 21.5cm (W) x 14cm (H) x 9cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.8kg
Color: Black full-grain leather.
Made in Italy

The interior layout is also very practical, with a removable mirror on the back.

items.name_en: Imported original leather💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The brand's iconic GG Marmont series ingeniously incorporates double-G logo hardware and cut-chain straps, selected from soft leather to create a soft silhouette. A simple back pocket adds practicality to the medium and large bags.
items.name_cn:
Imported original leather💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The brand's iconic GG Marmont series ingeniously incorporates double-G logo hardware and cut-chain straps, selected from soft leather to create a soft silhouette. A simple back pocket adds practicality to the medium and large bags.
Black V-shaped Matelassé lambskin
Light gold-tone hardware
Gucci AnacRed adhesive fiber lining
Double G
Interior: one zip pocket
Exterior: one open pocket
Sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (56cm high)
Spring buckle flap
Model: 837267.
Dimensions: 26cm (W) x 15cm (H) x 7cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.65kg
Color: Black full-grain leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: Large Size with Lock, 22cm, Black. OHANEL 🍠🍠🍠 26CJennie Celebrity Style 🌟🌟🌟. A bit of fashion is just right. This new model is totally vantage since! It should be the Jennie outfit from the Paris Fashion Week. This small flap shoulder bag has a bit of vintage charm. It is a favorite! Flap shoulder bag 🆕 bursting with charm, super beautiful [ ][ ]! Limited design, playing with classics in a new way. Wear it and instantly become the focus of the crowd 🤩🤩. A must-have for fashionistas! Vintage style combined with the durability and easy care of cowhide. Small and exquisite, various shapes at will, great for styling! Dimensions: 15x22x7cm

items.name_en: Dynamic Chip Version M87212 Exclusive Real Shot! This Boulogne bag reinterprets the classic design using Monogram Empreinte leather, showcasing a unique style with multiple carrying options. Easily fits a smartphone in the interior pocket, with a woven chain accented by dazzling metal pieces. Dimensions: 29×16×9.5cm
